prompt: Create a board-ready steering committee presentation on consolidating fragmented enterprise AI/ML tooling onto a single preferred platform. Audience: CIO, CTO, CFO, CISO, and business unit leaders. The deck should explain the current fragmentation cost, compare buy vs build, recommend a managed enterprise platform with federated ownership, show a phased migration roadmap, identify risks, and close with the specific decisions required.
acceptance_notes: Phase 3 smoke fixture only: validates planner/judge contracts can be exercised on a realistic executive-deck brief.
Phase 4 promotes this to a strict lighthouse gate with rendered slide thumbnails, judge scores, and repair-loop assertions.
Deck should include a clear storyline, decision-oriented recommendation, roadmap, risks, and executive ask.
